cells.v: 1- Add a new Vendor - How to
2- Add a new Item - How to
1. Fill of the name of your new vendor below
1. Go to your tab ( Meat & Poultry, Seafood, Produce )
2. Look at column C and find your vendors. Fix email in column F. Always add ; after each email adress.
2. Column E is your UofM purchase registered. This is what is facing on your PO, but does not impact the Suggested orders
3. Change the conversion measure. You should convert your UofM purchase to the Inventory.
3. Add vendors on the vendor list
